summary: Language Toggle feature VERIFIED. All backend endpoints working correctly, frontend toggle visibility logic correct (visible for different languages, hidden for same language). Toggle interaction, tooltip, and SSE expected_response_language all functioning as expected.

french_conversation_en_to_fr.details: Language toggle container visible, shows EN/FR codes correctly

english_conversation_en_to_en.details: Language toggle correctly NOT rendered (hidden) when native == target

toggle_interaction.details: Toggle clicks switch between native and target language highlighting, animation works

info_tooltip.details: Tooltip appears on hover showing 'Voice language switch' text with EN = English, FR = French

features_verified: Language toggle appears next to mic button when native != target language (French conversation)
Language toggle is HIDDEN when native == target language (English Practice)
Toggle clicking switches between native and target language highlighting
Info tooltip appears on hover/click with correct language names
Toggle shows correct language codes (EN, FR) based on conversation languages
Backend voice endpoint accepts optional language_hint form parameter
SSE done events include expected_response_language field for text and voice endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: CORRECT: ChatInput.jsx LanguageToggle component returns null when nativeLang === targetLang (line 29)
CORRECT: Toggle shows native/target language codes with proper styling
CORRECT: Info tooltip displays correct language names from languages API
CORRECT: ChatPage.js passes sttLanguage, nativeLang, targetLang, languages to ChatInput
CORRECT: api.js sendVoiceMessageStream accepts languageHint as 5th param and sends as form data
CORRECT: voice.py accepts language_hint Form param and uses it for Whisper STT
CORRECT: conversations.py SSE done event includes expected_response_language field

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all toggle visibility and interaction tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Used existing conversations - French (en->fr): b6f924a3-5819-47db-acdf-3812152678b7, English Practice (en->en): 3868cf2f-6fc6-4f42-b8f9-2d61a89bae9b
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language toggle feature fully verified. Toggle appears only when native_language != target_language. For French conversations (EN->FR), toggle shows EN|FR with info tooltip. For English Practice (EN->EN), toggle is correctly hidden. Backend voice endpoint accepts language_hint parameter. SSE streams return expected_response_language in done events.
